01-infrastructure-for-ai.instruction: List 5 infrastructure components AI apps need beyond traditional web apps. Explain why each is unique to AI.
01-infrastructure-for-ai.successMessage: AI infrastructure has unique requirements. Understanding them prevents expensive mistakes.

02-cloud-platforms-overview.instruction: Compare AWS, GCP, and Vercel for AI apps. Each: best AI feature, pricing model, when you'd choose it.
02-cloud-platforms-overview.successMessage: Cloud choice shapes your entire dev experience.

03-api-management.instruction: Design API rate limiting for your AI app. Limits per tier, what happens when hit, how to communicate limits.
03-api-management.successMessage: Rate limiting protects infrastructure and budget.

04-database-choices.instruction: Design database architecture for an AI app needing: user data, conversation history, vector embeddings, analytics. Which DB(s) and why?
04-database-choices.successMessage: Right tools for each job. Multi-database thinking.

05-deployment-strategies.instruction: Compare blue-green, canary, and rolling deployment for AI services. How each works with non-deterministic models.
05-deployment-strategies.successMessage: AI deployment needs special attention. Model behavior isn't deterministic.

06-monitoring-and-observability.instruction: Design AI app monitoring dashboard: 5 key metrics, 3 alerts, healthy vs unhealthy indicators for each.
06-monitoring-and-observability.successMessage: AI failures are often subtle quality degradation, not crashes.

07-cost-optimization.instruction: $500/month API costs for 1,000 users. List 5 strategies to cut costs 50% without hurting quality.
07-cost-optimization.successMessage: Cost optimization = profitable vs money pit.

08-security-and-compliance.instruction: 5 security risks unique to AI apps (prompt injection, data leakage, etc.) and mitigation for each.
08-security-and-compliance.successMessage: AI security awareness puts you ahead of most developers.

09-scaling-patterns.instruction: Design scaling for 10x traffic spikes. Include: auto-scaling, queuing, caching, graceful degradation.
09-scaling-patterns.successMessage: Handling 10x spikes separates hobby projects from production.

10-your-ai-infrastructure-stack.instruction: Design your complete AI infrastructure stack. For each layer (compute, storage, AI, networking, monitoring), choose tools and justify.
10-your-ai-infrastructure-stack.successMessage: Complete production AI infrastructure. A real architecture document.
